recipe.title: Chicken Enchiladas

ingredients.name: sea salt and freshly cracked black pepper
Mexican-blend shredded cheese
ingredients.note: inside rolls and over the top

ingredients.name: red enchilada sauce
ingredients.note: homemade preferred; glossy red sauce for coating and baking

steps.text: Preheat oven to 350°F and prepare a batch of red enchilada sauce.
steps.visualCue: brick-red sauce simmering to a glossy spoon-coating ribbon
steps.textureCue: powdery spices bloom into smooth nappant sauce
steps.runwayRisk: sauce may read as tomato marinara if the red chile color and viscosity are not specified

steps.text: Saute diced onion in oil for 3 minutes.
steps.visualCue: small onion cubes turn translucent and glossy in a shallow oil sheen
steps.textureCue: onion softens from matte white to translucent and wet
steps.runwayRisk: onion pieces can disappear unless shown as brief macro sizzle

steps.text: Add diced chicken and green chiles, season with salt and pepper, and saute until chicken is cooked through.
steps.visualCue: small chicken cubes turn opaque with green chile flecks and light steam
steps.textureCue: raw glossy chicken becomes firm, opaque, lightly browned at edges
steps.runwayRisk: avoid raw-to-cooked morphing in one long shot; use short hard cuts

steps.text: Stir in rinsed black beans until evenly combined, then remove from heat.
steps.visualCue: black beans tumble into pale chicken and red-green chile specks
steps.textureCue: matte beans contrast against moist chicken and glossy onion
steps.runwayRisk: beans can multiply or float if not anchored in the skillet

steps.text: Set up tortillas, enchilada sauce, chicken mixture, and cheese for assembly.
steps.visualCue: overhead assembly line with sauce, filling, cheese, and a single tortilla in focus
steps.textureCue: soft tortilla surface, glossy sauce streak, shredded cheese pile
steps.runwayRisk: neutral ingredient lineup is visually weak; use only as a quick context reset

steps.text: Spread two tablespoons of sauce over each tortilla.
steps.visualCue: back of spoon smears a red oval across a soft tortilla
steps.textureCue: thin glossy sauce layer catches light on matte tortilla
steps.runwayRisk: sauce should stay as a controlled smear, not flood the tortilla

steps.text: Add chicken filling in a line down the center and sprinkle with cheese.
steps.visualCue: spoonful of filling forms a raised line; cheese falls in short white-yellow strands
steps.textureCue: chunky moist filling against fine dry cheese shreds
steps.runwayRisk: filling line can look messy unless framed as one central ridge

steps.text: Roll each tortilla and place seam-side down in a greased 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
steps.visualCue: visible hands tuck and roll one tortilla into a cylinder, then line up the rolls
steps.textureCue: soft tortilla folds around dense filling without tearing
steps.runwayRisk: rolled geometry is fragile; use a raw rolled enchilada state reference

steps.text: Spread remaining sauce evenly over the rolled enchiladas and add extra cheese.
steps.visualCue: thick red sauce blankets parallel tortilla rolls, followed by a dense cheese snowfall
steps.textureCue: glossy sauce in troughs, dry shredded cheese catching on ridges
steps.runwayRisk: rolls may fuse into lasagna if the parallel cylinder topology is not protected

steps.text: Bake uncovered until hot, melty, and slightly crisp on the outside.
steps.visualCue: bubbling red sauce at edges, melted cheese with golden spots, tortilla tips slightly crisp
steps.textureCue: melted cheese stretches, oily bubbles tremble, edges toast
steps.runwayRisk: baked state should be a hard cut from raw tray state, not a slow morph

steps.text: Garnish and serve immediately while hot and melty.
steps.visualCue: cool sour cream zigzag, cotija crumble, cilantro, red onion, avocado over bubbling enchiladas
steps.textureCue: cold creamy white drizzle and crumbly cheese contrast with hot red sauce
steps.runwayRisk: fresh toppings can drift or melt into the hot sauce if not kept as distinct final accents

assumptions: Use the recipe author's flour tortilla version as the visual default because it rolls cleanly for Seedance.
Show homemade red enchilada sauce as a concise sauce-making arc even though Recipe2Video will not produce a tutorial.
Use black beans as the bean default because the source lists them in the ingredient card.
Use optional toppings selectively for color and texture: cilantro, red onion, avocado, sour cream, and cotija.
Do not include spoken instructions, on-screen text, or music in video prompts; Suno remains a separate manual music workflow.

criticalTransformations.name: red sauce bloom and simmer
criticalTransformations.from: oil, flour and spices looking powdery and separated
criticalTransformations.to: smooth brick-red glossy sauce that coats a spoon

criticalTransformations.name: chicken filling saute
criticalTransformations.from: raw diced chicken with sharp onion and green chiles
criticalTransformations.to: opaque moist chicken, translucent onion, green chile flecks, light steam

criticalTransformations.name: tortilla rolling
criticalTransformations.from: flat sauced tortilla with a central filling line
criticalTransformations.to: neat filled cylinder seam-side down in a baking dish
criticalTransformations.referenceNeed: recipe-specific raw rolled enchilada reference recommended

criticalTransformations.name: baking melt
criticalTransformations.from: cold red-sauced rolls with shredded cheese
criticalTransformations.to: bubbling red sauce, melted cheese, lightly crisp tortilla ridges
criticalTransformations.referenceNeed: recipe-specific baked bubbling tray reference recommended

criticalTransformations.name: fresh garnish contrast
criticalTransformations.to: distinct green, white, purple and pale cotija accents on top

visualTextureOpportunities: oil sizzle around diced onion and chicken
black beans tumbling into moist chicken filling
shredded cheese falling onto a sauced tortilla
fingers tucking and rolling a soft tortilla around chunky filling
parallel enchilada rolls disappearing under glossy red sauce
cheese snow over sauce before the oven
oven reveal with bubbling sauce and trembling melted cheese
sour cream zigzag and cotija crumble over hot sauce
final spoon lift with short cheese pull and steam

possibleHooks.description: Macro red enchilada sauce pours over parallel tortilla rolls, followed by cheese shreds sticking to the glossy surface.
possibleHooks.reason: Texture-first, immediately appetizing, and clarifies the baked comfort-food payoff.

possibleHooks.description: Open on a short spoon lift from baked enchiladas with melted cheese stretching, then jump back to filling and rolling.
possibleHooks.reason: High satisfaction but risks opening on final serving too early; use only if the first seconds must be very indulgent.

possibleHooks.description: A tortilla tucks around chicken filling in extreme close-up, then hard cuts to a tray of identical rolls.
possibleHooks.reason: Strong hand gesture and geometry, but slightly less scroll-stopping than the sauce-and-cheese hook.
